rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §25.0952, which governs criminal procedures for parent contributing to nonattendance offenses.
quote: Sec. 25.0952. PROCEDURES APPLICABLE TO PARENT CONTRIBUTING TO NONATTENDANCE OFFENSE.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
